race.comment: AMORE VELOCE (5) is fresh from a spell of ten weeks and did hit the frame when last resuming at Sunshine Coast over 1000m. In a different yard now and expecting a seamless transition. SHE SMASHES (6) finished just under two lengths away from the winner last time at Alpha and drops in the weights. Has a high cruising speed and best figures should see her run well. LAST DITCH EFFORT (8) turned in a decent effort last start to finish third over 1200m at this track. Finds a tougher race but a win is not out of the question. MAGICAL SLIPPER (2) was an impressive winner last time over 1200m at Roma, stalking the pace before lengthening nicely to score by 5 lengths. In form and worth including in calculations.
